title: Piramal Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Piramal Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
